purpose: Declares CopyHtmlToClipboard, the single entry point used by the controller to push rendered HTML (CF_HTML registered format) plus a UTF-16 plain-text fallback onto the Windows clipboard.
exports: markdownplusplus::CopyHtmlToClipboard(HWND owner, const std::wstring& articleHtml, const std::wstring& plainText) -> bool
invariants: owner HWND must be a window owned by the calling thread because OpenClipboard binds the clipboard to that thread.
